title: Introducing Agent Toolkit for AWS
summary: Agent Toolkit for AWS provides coding agents with access to up-to-date AWS documentation, best practices, and tested procedures to improve agent success rates. The toolkit includes four components: agent skills (Markdown runbooks), plugins, MCP configuration, and guardrails. The demo shows deployment of a Python Lambda with API Gateway in under three minutes.
